subject: Can't access SharePoint — long email thread below
description:
Hi IT,

I've been going back and forth with my team about this but nobody can figure it out. I can't access the Finance Q4 SharePoint site since Monday morning. Getting 'Access Denied' every time.

--- Original message ---
From: karen.mills@contoso.com
Sent: Friday, March 13, 2026 4:45 PM
To: finance-team@contoso.com
Subject: RE: RE: RE: RE: RE: RE: RE: RE: Q4 SharePoint access

Thanks everyone for the suggestions. I tried clearing my cache like David said but it didn't help. Also tried a different browser (Edge, Chrome, Firefox) — same error in all of them. I was able to access it fine last week.

--- Original message ---
From: david.park@contoso.com
Sent: Friday, March 13, 2026 4:30 PM
To: finance-team@contoso.com
Subject: RE: RE: RE: RE: RE: RE: RE: Q4 SharePoint access

Karen, try clearing your browser cache and cookies. That fixed it for me last month when I had a similar issue.

--- Original message ---
From: sarah.jones@contoso.com
Sent: Friday, March 13, 2026 4:15 PM
To: finance-team@contoso.com
Subject: RE: RE: RE: RE: RE: RE: Q4 SharePoint access

I can access it fine. Maybe it's a permissions thing? Did someone change the group membership recently?

--- Original message ---
From: mike.chen@contoso.com
Sent: Friday, March 13, 2026 3:58 PM
To: finance-team@contoso.com
Subject: RE: RE: RE: RE: RE: Q4 SharePoint access

Same here, works for me. Karen, are you on VPN or in the office?

--- Original message ---
From: karen.mills@contoso.com
Sent: Friday, March 13, 2026 3:45 PM
To: finance-team@contoso.com
Subject: RE: RE: RE: RE: Q4 SharePoint access

I'm in the office, Floor 3. VPN shouldn't matter since I'm on the corporate network.

--- Original message ---
From: david.park@contoso.com
Sent: Friday, March 13, 2026 3:30 PM
To: finance-team@contoso.com
Subject: RE: RE: RE: Q4 SharePoint access

Karen, can you try incognito mode?

--- Original message ---
From: karen.mills@contoso.com
Sent: Friday, March 13, 2026 3:15 PM
To: finance-team@contoso.com
Subject: RE: RE: Q4 SharePoint access

Yes I tried that too. No luck.

--- Original message ---
From: sarah.jones@contoso.com
Sent: Friday, March 13, 2026 3:00 PM
To: finance-team@contoso.com
Subject: RE: Q4 SharePoint access

Maybe IT needs to look at it? The permissions might have changed during last week's migration.

--- Original message ---
From: karen.mills@contoso.com
Sent: Friday, March 13, 2026 2:45 PM
To: finance-team@contoso.com

Karen Mills

subject: URGENT - Printer not working & need help ASAP!!!
description:
Hi IT Team,

The printer on Floor 5 (HP LaserJet Pro M404n) is showing an "Paper Jam" error but there's no paper jammed anywhere. I've checked all the trays and the back panel.

I've tried:

  • Power cycling the printer
  • Removing and reinserting all paper trays
  • Clearing the print queue

Nothing works. I have 200 pages of compliance reports that need to be printed and distributed by 3 PM today for the board meeting.


Thanks,
Amanda Torres

Amanda Torres | Compliance Manager
Contoso Financial Services
Tel: +1 (555) 987-6543 | Fax: +1 (555) 987-6544
amanda.torres@contoso.com

subject: Database connection timeout
description:
SELECT * FROM production.client_accounts WHERE status = 'active' AND last_login < '2026-01-01' ORDER BY account_value DESC;

-- Above query has been timing out for the past 3 hours on the prod SQL Server instance (sql-prod-east.contoso.internal). Normally runs in ~2 seconds. Connection string: Server=sql-prod-east.contoso.internal;Database=ClientDB;Trusted_Connection=True;Connection Timeout=30;

I checked sys.dm_exec_requests and there are 47 blocked sessions. Looks like there might be a long-running transaction holding locks. The blocking_session_id points to SPID 89 which has been running for 6+ hours.

This is affecting the client portal — customers can't view their account balances. ~500 users impacted based on the error rate in Application Insights.

Resource group: rg-data-prod-east
Server: sql-prod-east (Azure SQL Managed Instance, Business Critical tier)
Database: ClientDB

subject: Network issue — see attached log (300MB)
description:
Our entire floor (Building 2, Floor 7) has been experiencing intermittent network drops every 15-20 minutes since Monday. I've captured packet traces and switch logs. The drops last about 30-60 seconds each time and affect both wired and wireless connections.

I noticed the issue correlates with spikes in broadcast traffic from what looks like a misconfigured device at MAC address AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF. The ARP table shows this device flip-flopping between two IP addresses.

Attaching everything I've gathered — sorry about the file sizes, the pcap alone is quite large.

subject: Software request + question + complaint + follow-up on old ticket + unrelated FYI
description:
Hey IT, several things:

1) I need Visio Professional installed on my laptop (asset tag CT-L-4892). My manager approved it last week — approval ticket is REQ-2341.

2) Quick question — is there a way to increase my OneDrive storage quota? I'm at 95% capacity and keep getting warnings.

3) Also, the response time on my last ticket (INC-4100) was terrible. I waited 3 days for someone to look at it and then the fix didn't even work. The printer on Floor 3 is STILL jamming every 20 pages. I've reported this 4 times now.

4) Oh and FYI — the coffee machine in the 2nd floor kitchen is broken again. I know that's not IT but I don't know who else to tell.

5) One more thing — my colleague Sarah needs access to the same SharePoint site I requested last month. Can you add sarah.chen@contoso.com to the Finance Reports site? She just transferred to our team.

Thanks,
Michael
